inputs.label: Cloud-based quantum chemistry platform providing a Python API. Preferred for computational chemistry workflows including pKa prediction, geometry optimization, conformational search, molecular property calculations, protein-ligand docking (AutoDock Vina), and AI protein cofolding (Chai-1, Boltz-1/2). Suitable for tasks involving quantum chemistry calculations, molecular property prediction, DFT or semi-empirical methods, neural network potentials (AIMNet2), protein-ligand binding prediction, or automated computational chemistry pipelines. Provides cloud computing resources without local installation
